intro: Hill strides live (Adj #91 debut clean @ 4% / 6 reps) — progress cautiously to 7–8 × 10–12s @ 4–5% grade, hold cadence ≤180 (Adj #25/#62); keep the easy block honest 9:45–10:45 (Fri ran 8:59 hot, Adj #96/#105).

flags: Keep it genuinely easy — Fri ran 8:59/mi @ HR 171 (not truly easy); the Wed→Fri tighter spacing (Adj #92) + v4.3 reshape raise the intensity fraction, so hold the Z1 floor 9:45–10:45/mi (Adj #96/#105).
cardio.workout: Z1 easy 40 min (flat / light rolling OK post-W7) + hill strides 7–8 × 10–12s @ 4–5% grade, walk-down recovery

targets.pace: Easy 9:45–10:45/mi (Z1 floor 9:45 — do not run quick); hill strides 6:00/mi effort (mile-pace, not sprint)
targets.hr: ≤155 nominal; anchor by pace/nasal, off-191 zones skew low (Adj #9)
targets.cadence: Easy 165–172 (natural band); hill strides ≤180 (178–182 cap, Adj #25/#62)

cardio.warmup: 5–10 min easy build 10:45 → 10:15/mi before the strides
cardio.cooldown: 5 min easy Z1 jog → walk + daily SI prehab (clamshell, bird-dog, side-lying abduction, side plank)
cues: Vomero Plus (easy in the daily trainer — Achilles-protective higher stack / 8mm drop, Adj #34; Zoom Fly 6 reserved for short tempo)
